data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of an override option for preferred clients to see full availability. However, the evidence does not provide any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality is implemented or operational. The linked use case mentions the override option, but there is no evidence demonstrating that it is effectively functioning as required, leading to a clear gap in the validation.
gaps: No evidence of an override option for preferred clients to see full availability.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add API endpoint for client availability override
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that preferred clients can access full availability through the API.
